message:
feat(apple-reminders): expand test coverage and implement ConnectorErrorMapping

Client tests:
- Extract shared client_with_list() and client_no_list() helpers to
  deduplicate config construction across all test functions.
- Add coverage for list_reminders_invocation with default list override
  and no-default fallback, list_lists_invocation (no args), create
  reminder with explicit/default/no list, complete_reminder_invocation
  ID passthrough, and search_reminders_invocation query passthrough.

Error mapping:
- Implement ConnectorErrorMapping trait for AppleRemindersError, mapping
  Timeout and Cancelled async errors to Process variants, and delegating
  to the existing to_fcp_error() method for FCP error propagation.
- Add is_retryable() const method (always false for local osascript).
- Add unit tests verifying Config to InvalidRequest, UnsupportedPlatform
  to ConnectorUnavailable, Process to Internal FCP error mapping, plus
  display formatting coverage.

Types:
- Add serde derives and display formatting for Apple Reminders domain
  types used in structured test assertions and JSON artifact snapshots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
